beat: Generated sites can look ready but miss crawler launch-readiness files.
Enter the live URL and local project folder.
Check what crawlers and preview bots can see.
Needs attention separates safe work from review-required changes.
Preview the two safe crawl files: app/robots.ts and app/sitemap.ts.
The GUI writes nothing; copy the guarded creation-only command. No overwrites, content edits, commits, or deploys.
Review locally, deploy when ready, then re-check the live site.
